response.justification: Bogdan brings roughly 20 years of broad engineering experience across web, embedded, mobile, and open-source domains, and his current role touches AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling — a relevant signal. However, the role demands a director-level individual contributor with recognized, externally validated AI expertise, the ability to advise large strategic customers on cloud and AI adoption, and a track record of shaping AI-powered products or platforms at scale. The candidate's AI exposure is recent, narrow in scope, and not accompanied by any thought leadership, publications, or notable AI-driven products. His career arc is that of a strong senior-to-staff IC developer, not a strategic technical leader positioned to influence product direction and inspire cross-organizational stakeholders.
strengths: 20-year multi-domain engineering career spanning web, embedded systems, mobile, and infrastructure, demonstrating genuine technical versatility
Entrepreneurial track record: founded GISCollective, early freelance roots, and contributions at startup-stage companies (WatchUp, RIDE Capital)
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP (Model Context Protocol) code generators at re:cinq, showing current engagement with the AI tooling space
concerns: No demonstrated recognized expertise in AI — no AI-driven products at scale, no publications, no advisory history, and AI work only began in 2025
Educational background (BS in CS + BA in Photography/Design) does not align with the preferred Master's or PhD in an AI-related field, and there is no compensating AI research track record
Career trajectory is senior/staff individual contributor focused on delivery; no evidence of strategic advisory, external thought leadership, or director-level scope expected for this role
